channel.title: project on Home
channel.description: Recent content in project on Home

item.title: MicroMouse
item.description: MicroMouse # Context # So I saw this awesome video on Veritasium’s channel today and was totally fascinated by the different techniques used by the MicroMouse competition winners to make you solve this simple yet awesome problem. It got me thinking, can I implement this game in a language I’m not that good in, c++?. The Game # The Game is as follows: You have an unknown maze that is revealed at the start You cannot have any device other than the mouse, no Iot allowed.
